perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark brown hair, wearing a black bra or tank top, is framed in a close-up selfie shot. She looks directly at the camera with an expressive and slightly annoyed facial expression. (2) As she speaks, she shifts her gaze, gestures by tossing her hair back with her hand, and emphasizes her points with subtle head tilts. (3) The background is a soft-focus indoor environment, possibly a bedroom or hotel room with beige walls and a bed, which remains static throughout the clip.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A young female voice is heard speaking in Mandarin Chinese with a conversational, complaining, and somewhat playful tone. There is no background music. (2) The soundscape is dominated by the vocal recording, with minimal background hum or room tone. (3) No sound effects or external noises are present; the audio ends abruptly as she finishes her sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "那天整天問我有沒有" (Asked me all day if I have), "男朋友的人很煩餒" (people asking about a boyfriend are so annoying). Tone is venting. (2) Functional Text: "我就時有時無啊" (I just sometimes have and sometimes don't), "跟你說沒有" (Told you no). Tone is matter-of-fact. (3) Functional Text: "然後下次你又問" (Then next time you ask again), "我跟你說有" (I tell you yes), "然後你就說我騙你" (Then you say I lied to you), "啊 超煩的" (Ah, super annoying). Tone is humorous frustration.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a personal vlog/rant aimed at sharing a humorous observation about the creator's social interactions. She describes the annoyance of people constantly questioning her relationship status and the paradoxical reactions she gets regardless of her answer, serving as relatable comedy for her audience.
